audit_items.proof_trace: The formula at L793-795 is `startMult - (startMult - endMult).mulDiv(elapsed, duration)`. At elapsed=0 mulDiv returns 0, giving startMult. At elapsed=duration mulDiv returns (startMult-endMult) exactly (no rounding), giving endMult. Both boundary conditions hold by exact arithmetic. Preconditions auctionDuration!=0 (L647) and endMult<=startMult (L653) prevent underflow or division-by-zero.
